label: US humiliation / incompetence
description: Content mocking US decision-makers, military competence or political messaging.

label: US–Israel dependency frame
description: Narrative that US decision-making is subordinate to Israeli interests or escalation.

label: Revenge / deterrence
description: Retaliation, target lists, strikes, threat projection and deterrence messaging.

label: Pop-culture memetic persuasion
description: Use of Lego-like visuals, songs, parody, blockbuster references or meme tropes to reach audiences beyond news followers.

label: Platform moderation / takedown
description: Coverage or records about platform removals, bans, mirrors or reuploads.

label: Creator/source infrastructure
description: Source pages, creator clusters, channels and infrastructure used for production or distribution.

label: Media analysis / research coverage
description: Journalistic, expert or academic analysis of the Lego-style campaign and its effects.

label: Unverified or claim-heavy content
description: Records with claims that need separate verification or evidentiary support.
